title: Build & Launch Your Personal Content Calendar
objective: Create a 30-day content calendar so you never wonder what to post — consistency becomes automatic.
whyItMatters: A content calendar removes daily decision fatigue and ensures your brand shows up consistently.
workSummary: Map 30 days of content using your 3 pillars
Assign formats: posts, articles, videos, stories
Schedule or batch-create your first week

aiPrompts.label: AI Power-Up Prompt
aiPrompts.prompt: Create a 30-day content calendar for my personal brand. Content pillars: [pillars]. Posting frequency: [X times/week]. Platforms: [LinkedIn, etc.]. Include topic, format, and hook for each post.

reflectionPrompts: Does my calendar balance value, personality, and promotion?
Am I being realistic about my posting capacity?
Which content types get the most engagement from my audience?
actionSteps: Use the AI prompt to generate topic ideas
Schedule posts using a tool or manual calendar
Review and adjust based on engagement after 2 weeks
optionalPost: Built my 30-day content calendar today. Consistency is a system, not a personality trait.
